Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.

Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

items.name: HRRL – Engineer/Officer, Jr. Executive and More – 134 Posts

basic_details.job_title: HRRL Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 134 Engineer/Officer, Jr. Executive and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: HRRL Recruitment 2026: 134 Engineer/Officer, Jr. Executive and More vacancies. Apply online from 14 May to 03 June 2026 at hrrl.in.
basic_details.post_name: Jr. Executive, Asst. Engineer/Officer, Engineer/Officer, Senior Engineer, Senior Manager (Engineering, Finance, Medical, IS, Fire & Safety); Plant Heads (FTEs)
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (via https://www.hrrl.in/ → Careers → Current Openings)

selection_process: Computer Based Test (CBT) + Skill Test + Personal Interview + Physical Fitness/Medical
CBT + Group Task/Group Discussion + Personal Interview + Medical
Technical Competency Interview + Behavioural Competency Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only at https://www.hrrl.in/ → Careers → Current Openings. No other mode of application is accepted. The portal is active from 14.05.2026 to 03.06.2026 (23:45 hrs). Candidates applying for experienced positions (S/G E2, E3, E5) must upload their detailed resume, essential education certificate, and experience certificates in a single PDF file at the time of online application. Candidates should submit only one application; if multiple applications are submitted, only the latest will be considered. All details entered in the online form are final - no changes will be entertained after submission. Admit cards for CBT and call letters for Skill Test/Personal Interview will be available for download on the HRRL website only; no hard copies will be sent.
